name: searchByEnglishName
description: Searches for a custom object by its English name and returns a pointer to it. Returns null if not found.

parameters.name: customObjectEnglishName
parameters.description: The English name of the custom object to search for

returnDescription: Shared pointer to the custom object, or null if not found

name: addCustomObject
signature: addCustomObject(QString designation, Vec3d coordinates, bool isVisible)
description: Adds a custom object or marker at the specified J2000 equatorial coordinates (3D vector). Custom objects can be used to mark interesting locations on the celestial sphere.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Name or identifier for the custom object (e.g., 'My Star', 'Marker 1')

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: J2000 equatorial coordinates as a normalized 3D vector (create with core.vec3d(x, y, z))

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: true to show as a marker (cross symbol), false to hide

name: addCustomObject
signature: addCustomObject(QString designation, QString ra, QString dec, bool isVisible)
description: Adds a custom object or marker at the specified J2000 equatorial coordinates using right ascension and declination strings. This is the most convenient way to add custom objects from script.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Name or identifier for the custom object

parameters.name: ra
parameters.description: Right Ascension in J2000 frame (e.g., '5h 35m 17.3s' or '83.822°')

parameters.name: dec
parameters.description: Declination in J2000 frame (e.g., '-5° 23′ 28″' or '-5.391°')

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: true to show as a marker (cross symbol), false to hide

name: addCustomObjectRaDec
signature: addCustomObjectRaDec(QString designation, QString ra, QString dec, bool isVisible)
description: Adds a custom object or marker at the specified equatorial coordinates using the current date's Right Ascension/Declination (not J2000). The coordinates are automatically converted to J2000.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Name or identifier for the custom object

parameters.name: ra
parameters.description: Right Ascension for the current date (e.g., '5h 35m 17.3s')

parameters.name: dec
parameters.description: Declination for the current date (e.g., '-5° 23′ 28″')

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: true to show as a marker, false to hide

name: addCustomObjectAltAzi
signature: addCustomObjectAltAzi(QString designation, QString alt, QString azi, bool isVisible)
description: Adds a custom object or marker at the specified Altitude/Azimuth coordinates. The coordinates are automatically converted to J2000 equatorial coordinates.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Name or identifier for the custom object

parameters.name: alt
parameters.description: Altitude angle (e.g., '45°', '30d', '0.5rad')

parameters.name: azi
parameters.description: Azimuth angle (e.g., '90°' for East, '180°' for South)

parameters.name: isVisible
parameters.description: true to show as a marker, false to hide

name: removeCustomObjects
description: Removes all temporary custom objects (markers) from the sky. Persistent objects remain unaffected.

name: removeCustomObject
description: Removes a specific custom object by its English name.

parameters.name: englishName
parameters.description: The English name of the custom object to remove

name: setMarkersColor
description: Sets the color of custom object markers (the cross symbols displayed on screen).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color created with core.vec3f(r, g, b) where r,g,b range 0.0-1.0

name: getMarkersColor
description: Returns the current color of custom object markers as an RGB array [R, G, B].
returnDescription: RGB color array [R, G, B] where each component ranges 0.0-1.0
example:
var color = CustomObjectMgr.getMarkersColor();
core.debug('Current marker color - R: ' + color[0] + ', G: ' + color[1] + ', B: ' + color[2]);

name: setMarkersSize
description: Sets the size of custom object markers (the cross symbols) in pixels.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Marker size in pixels (default: 5.0, typical range: 1-20)

name: getMarkersSize
description: Returns the current size of custom object markers in pixels.
example:
var size = CustomObjectMgr.getMarkersSize();
core.debug('Current marker size: ' + size + ' pixels');

name: setSelectPriority
description: Sets the selection priority for custom objects. Higher priority values make custom objects easier to select when multiple objects are near each other.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Selection priority (default: -2.0, higher = more selectable)

name: getSelectPriority
description: Returns the current selection priority for custom objects.

name: addPersistentObject
signature: addPersistentObject(QString designation, Vec3d coordinates, QString objectType)
description: Adds a persistent custom object that is saved to disk and will reappear when Stellarium is restarted. These objects are stored in persistentCustomObjects.json in the user data directory.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Name or identifier for the persistent object (must be unique)

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: J2000 equatorial coordinates as a normalized 3D vector

parameters.name: objectType
parameters.description: Type description for the object (e.g., 'star', 'nebula', 'custom object')

compatibility.notes: Public method, not a slot, but callable from scripts

name: removePersistentObjects
description: Removes all persistent custom objects from the sky and deletes them from the persistent storage file.

compatibility.notes: Public method, not a slot, but callable from scripts
